name: calculate_hash
description:
Calculate the hash of a given text. Example: - Calculate hash of ... 
 - What is the hash of ...
instructions:
Use the call_js_skill tool to calculate the hash of a given text.

- The <url> to load is: https://html-preview.github.io/?url=https://github.com/jinjingforever/dump/blob/main/calculate_hash/v1/index.html
- The <data> is a simple string: the text to hash.

name: plot_chart
instructions:
Use the call_js_skill tool to plot a chart.

- The <url> to load is: https://jinjingforever.github.io/gallery_js_skills/plot_chart/v9/index.html
- The <data> is a stringified json with the following field:
   - <type>: The type of the chart. Could be "line chart" or "bar chart". Default to line chart.
   - <labels>: an array of string for labels.
   - <values>: an array of numbers for values.

name: check_wikipedia
description:
MUST use call_js_skill tool to query the topic on Wikipedia. DO NOT try to access it directly and use any internal knowledge. When to use: - Check wikipedia... 
- ... from wikipedia...
instructions:
Use the call_js_skill tool to query the summary of the topic. 

- The <url> to load is: https://jinjingforever.github.io/gallery_js_skills/wiki_summary/v1/index.html
- The <data> is a string of the topic.

name: create_github_issue
description: Create a new issue on a GitHub repository.
instructions:
Use the call_js_skill tool to create a new issue on a GitHub repository.

- The <url> to load is: https://jinjingforever.github.io/gallery_js_skills/create_github_issue/v7/index.html
- The <data> is a stringified json with the following field:
   - <repo>: the full repository name (e.g., 'jinjingforever/dump').
   - <title>: the title of the issue.
   - <content>: the body of the issue.
